description: This sport inspired shoe from woodland is just as smart on the tracks as it is around town. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysPerforations on the toe box and midfootCentral lace upsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and an upraised heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
